nodes.summary: Aceh bulbul（Pycnonotus snouckaerti）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Aceh bulbul。

nodes.name: Aceh bulbul
nodes.summary: The Aceh bulbul (Pycnonotus snouckaerti) is a species of songbird in the bulbul family of passerine birds. It is found in the mountains of north-western Sumatra and is endemic to the island. Its natural habitat is tropical moist lowland forest. Taxonomy and systematics The Aceh bulbul was formerly considered as a subspecies of the orange-spotted bulbul until split by the IOC in 2016. Most other authorities have not yet recognized this split. References
